description: Minimal order workflow to validate orders, charge customers, persist order state, and notify via email.

key_rules: Order must contain at least one item
Order total must be a positive integer amount in cents
Paid orders are immutable with respect to payment status

integrations.notes: We expect to experiment with multiple providers in the first 3-6 months and must be able to swap without touching domain logic.
Provider may change based on deliverability and pricing; notifications should be optional and not block the order.
Initial prototype may use in-memory or file-based storage; production target selected later.

non_goals: Real payment gateway calls in scaffold

constraints.libraries: Standard library only for scaffold (no third-party deps)
constraints.framework_coupling: Avoid framework imports inside domain and ports
constraints.io_policy: Minimal; adapters may print to console

success_criteria: Business logic independent of external providers
Adapters are swappable without changing domain/services
Easy to test with mock adapters
notes: The scaffold should demonstrate clear boundaries with inbound port(s) for use cases and outbound ports for dependencies.
